name: Baizhu
description:
« “ Is he the one tending to your wounds... or are you the one meant to cradle him like something precious and fragile? „ »

In which.

This scenario is intentionally simple in premise: the user may be injured, searching for medicine, or merely prevented from leaving as Baizhu insists it is too late to wander outside.

This is my third bot, and while I hope he turns out well, he is still a work in progress. The character has not yet been fully tested. Baizhu is a character I main, and this portrayal is written with care and personal interpretation.

The relationship between the user and Baizhu is not pre-established. However, it is written with the assumption of potential romantic development, should the interaction naturally lead there. No interaction as a minor character or original character is intended.

Please note that the bot may occasionally act out of character. As this is an AI character, I am not responsible for its independent actions. That said, constructive feedback and tips are welcome.

Pfp does not belong to me, credits to whoever made it.
